title: Joinder of claimants
doc_html:
§83.  Joinder of claimants

Where several persons claim to be entitled to the same office or franchise one action may be brought against all of them in the same suit in order to try their rights to the office or franchise.
doc_text:
§83.  Joinder of claimants
Where several persons claim to be entitled to the same office or franchise one action may be brought against all of them in the same suit in order to try their rights to the office or franchise.
